{{Quote|There was a rumor that Rutin no longer wanted to be involved in his family's dealings. Although he could not easily divorce himself from the crime business, Senator Crote has told us that Rutin was prepared to testify before the Senate against his family. He wanted to put an end to the crime ring altogether. Not long after Rutin agreed to testify, he was killed.|[[Jocasta Nu/Legends|Jocasta Nu]]|<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Only Witness">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Only Witness]]''</ref>}}
'''Rutin Cobral''' was the [[Marriage/Legends|husband]] of [[Lena Cobral]] and the son of [[Zanita Cobral]]. He grew sick of the [[Cobral family]]'s [[The Cobral|plundering]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Frego]] and compiled a case against them. However, his siblings and [[Parent/Legends|mother]] caught on and [[Death/Legends|executed]] him.

Rutin was avenged by his wife, Lena, who found the evidence and testified against the family in front of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. After hearing the evidence, the Senate ordered the Cobrals to be placed under arrest.
